candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary line appears separately from 'Cost of goods sold', so it does not look embedded in the selected COGS row; however, it is a company-level total and is not specifically tied to COGS.
Separate operating depreciation line appears below the D&A summary and looks like a component/detail rather than a COGS-specific line.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A total is visible, but it is not labelled as COGS / cost of sales / cost of revenue. Because the visible D&A is unattributed and may span multiple operating buckets, adding it to COGS would risk misallocation and double counting. Conservative choice is no separate COGS_DA row.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary line appears separately from 'Selling, general, and administrative', so it does not look embedded in the selected SG&A row; however, it is not specifically identified as SG&A-related.
Separate depreciation detail line appears beneath the D&A summary and looks like a component/detail, not an SG&A-specific D&A line.

variables.notes: Changed Manually. A separate operating D&A total is visible, but it is a generic total rather than an SG&A-specific D&A row. No dedicated R&D row is selected, and no 'amortization in SGA' or similar attribution is shown. Conservative choice is no separate XSGA_DA row.
